description: Use this API to retrieve the attributes of the Scenario. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, rootpath, startupgroup, creationdate, createdby, changedate, changedby, name, version, versionpsse = scenariogetattrs()
python_syntax: ierr, rootpath, startupgroup, creationdate, createdby, changedate, changedby, name, version, versionpsse = scenariogetattrs()

return_values.name: version
return_values.description: Version of scenario the file was saved under. (output).

return_values.name: versionpsse
return_values.description: Version of psse the file was saved under. (output).
